user.name: Marcus Williams
user.title: Fashion Designer
user.bio: Emerging fashion designer fresh from SCAD with a focus on sustainable streetwear and contemporary silhouettes. Passionate about ethical fashion and innovative textile treatments.

portfolio.title: Marcus Williams Design
portfolio.tagline: Sustainable fashion for the modern world

pages.title: About
pages.content:
I'm a recent graduate from the Savannah College of Art and Design with a BFA in Fashion Design. My work focuses on creating sustainable, wearable pieces that don't compromise on style.

Inspired by urban environments and contemporary art, I specialize in clean lines, innovative fabric treatments, and ethical production methods. Currently building my brand and seeking opportunities to showcase my designs.

pages.title: Collection
pages.content: My debut collection 'Urban Sustainability' explores the intersection of streetwear aesthetics and eco-conscious design.

projects.title: Urban Sustainability Collection
projects.description: Debut collection featuring seven looks that blend streetwear silhouettes with sustainable materials. Each piece is designed for versatility and longevity, using organic cotton, recycled polyester, and innovative hemp blends.

pages.title: Process
pages.content: From concept to creation - a look at my design methodology.
